name: naga
description: WGSL shader tools — Naga compiler, validation, and translation (WebGPU)

subcommands.name: validate
subcommands.description: Validate WGSL shader syntax and semantics

subcommands.name: convert
subcommands.description: Convert WGSL to SPIR-V, GLSL, HLSL, or Metal

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: Display shader module information (entry points, bindings)

subcommands.name: compact
subcommands.description: Minify WGSL shader removing whitespace and comments

subcommands.name: lint
subcommands.description: Check WGSL for common issues and performance hints

globalOptions.name: --target
globalOptions.description: Target shading language (spirv, glsl, hlsl, msl)

globalOptions.name: --validate
globalOptions.description: Run validation in addition to conversion
